_note: Stop hook auto-runs cost-track at session end so the cost-tracking namespace stays populated without users remembering to run `/cost-track` manually. TRACK_QUIET=1 suppresses the markdown summary (avoid spamming on every Stop). A track failure NEVER blocks session end — analytics data is best-effort, not load-bearing (see scripts/ruflo-hook.cjs).
_platform_note: #2721 — the command below is a `node -e` bootstrap: it resolves scripts/ruflo-hook.cjs from process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT INSIDE Node (no shell `${VAR}`/`%VAR%` expansion), so the exact same command string runs unchanged on Windows, macOS, and Linux. No bash or /dev/null redirection involved.
